nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and planning partner
nodes.grounding_span: I started using AI to help me brainstorm and create a plan to build the project

nodes.label: AI reliability and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: even the latest version of GPT can hallucinate a lot and so I was always weary of this issue

nodes.label: AI for complex structured tasks (SQL, debugging)
nodes.label_negative: AI for nuanced, specific requirements (GUI design)
nodes.grounding_span: ChatGPT still struggles to understand very specific requirements

nodes.label: AI as aid tool not replacement
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to always have this reserved approach to AI as an aid tool and not a complete replacement

nodes.label: AI for safety-sensitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for safety-sensitive tasks without human verification
nodes.grounding_span: Safety sensitive tasks such as performing calculations for designing pipeline systems, would also be done almost entirely on my own

nodes.label: AI for meeting notes
nodes.label_negative: AI for meeting notes without privacy safeguards
nodes.grounding_span: One thing AI could be really useful for is keeping effective notes during meetings

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: Quickly creating otherwise tedious queries...was really helpful

nodes.label: Professional competence and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I would run sanity checks on my work process using AI before consulting my supervisor just to iron out any obvious errors

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: As long as I am writing code, with or without AI, I am still practicing my coding skill

nodes.label: Privacy and ethics
nodes.grounding_span: This obviously has some implications about privacy and ethics

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for SQL and debugging
nodes.grounding_span: AI was able to help me really well with creating complex and effective SQL queries

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for GUI design
nodes.grounding_span: I got really frustrated while using AI to help me design the GUI

nodes.label: Skepticism and caution toward AI
nodes.grounding_span: I am always skeptical of what I get from AI

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for meeting notes
nodes.grounding_span: One thing AI could be really useful for is keeping effective notes during meetings

nodes.label: Iterative verification and testing
nodes.grounding_span: I always do my own research and testing before deploying any AI generated code

nodes.label: Domain-based task differentiation
nodes.grounding_span: Tasks such as creating a presentation for the upper management, I would do almost entirely myself
